source.description: NOAA Storm Prediction Center (SPC) tornado database containing detailed tornado event records for the United States. Includes track paths, intensity ratings, casualties, and damage estimates.

datasets.events.parquet: Individual tornado events with paths, intensity, and impact data
datasets.aggregates.parquet: Annual tornado statistics aggregated by country

metrics.tornado_scale: Enhanced Fujita (EF) or Fujita (F) scale rating
metrics.deaths_direct: Deaths directly caused by the tornado
metrics.deaths_indirect: Deaths indirectly caused by the tornado
metrics.injuries_direct: Injuries directly caused by the tornado
metrics.injuries_indirect: Injuries indirectly caused by the tornado

data_quality_notes: Pre-1990 intensity ratings may be less reliable due to different assessment methods
Path length and width estimates improved with Doppler radar era (post-1990)
EF scale replaced Fujita scale in 2007
sequence_id groups tornadoes from same outbreak/supercell
